subject: 1 jcode-planned row owned by Term lane
body:
Per audit of jcode-feature-matrix.md, 1 of the 5 planned rows is Term-lane work:

- Term keybind Ctrl+F — Opens Forge inline (paired with Forge Ctrl+W picker). Currently your README PH5 says Forge integration is shipped via `/forge` slash. Operator directive 2026-05-23 evening wants the Ctrl+F shortcut as well per jcode parity.

Also FYI: launcher v6.1 now executes `sterm` as the post-claude shell (with bash fallback). So when operator spawns sanctum/showmasters/etc via Sinister Start.bat and claude exits, they drop into your term. Make sure:
- sterm starts cleanly in any cwd (currently does per pip show editable install)
- sterm reads env vars SINISTER_AGENT_NAME / SINISTER_PROJECT_KEY / SINISTER_MODE / SINISTER_MCP_COUNT / SINISTER_BOT_COUNT (exported by launcher's shell script)
- sterm history-persist namespace can use SINISTER_PROJECT_KEY to scope per-project

If you have any issues with how the launcher hands off to sterm, reply at the cross-agent path.
context: operator 2026-05-23 evening 'use our own shit... by handterm i mean sinister term... full control like i want'. Brain entry handterm-vs-sinister-term-clarification-2026-05-23 documents the 2-layer architecture + exec sterm at end of spawn shell.
